data.title: Stanford research highlights fasting mimicking as new path for Crohn's Disease, promoting nutrition-based solutions - PRNewswireLOS ANGELES, Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Findings support the growing scientific basis for nutrition-focused methods aimed at altering illness development and promoting remission-focused treatment. The study was conducted in Los Angeles and released on January 28, 2026. L-Nutra is highlighted as the leading nutri-technology firm pioneering evidence-based tactics.

data.title: Traders predict S&P 500 could reach 7600-7800 by Dec 2026 on Kalshi, 19% wager between those levels. Optimism for continued upward trajectory.
data.description: According to traders on Kalshi, a prediction market contract tied to the S&P 500 index suggests that it could reach between 7600 and 7800 by December 31, 2026. Approximately 19% of traders believe the index will close within this range. This projection indicates a positive outlook for the benchmark, which tracks the largest U.S. stocks, and is higher than recent levels. In 2025, the S&P 500 saw an increase of about 16-18%, demonstrating significant growth despite a volatile year influenced by former President Donald Trump.

data.title: Carl's Jr. gives fans free Hangover Burger and $20 promo cards on Feb 9 with Prediction Payback for bad predictions. (Char. count: 102)
data.description: Following the Big Game, on January 28th, 2026, in Franklin, Tennessee, Carl's Jr. is offering a Promotion called Prediction Payback to help individuals recover from hangovers and feelings of regret. This initiative aims to support people dealing with the aftermath of the event. The offer provides a free Carl's Jr. item to alleviate the consequences of the celebration, often associated with hangovers and bruised egos following such occasions. This promotion reflects the brand's recognition of the challenges individuals face post-celebrations, with significant emphasis on supporting their consumers during such times.

data.title: Baltimore receives $2B in arts investment, attracting national talent and cultural innovation.
data.description: New data from a recent analysis by the Greater Baltimore Committee reveals that Baltimore is attracting significant investments, talent, and cultural innovation on a national level. The analysis highlights the city's diverse range of attractions, including major sports and cultural landmarks, as well as makerspaces and creative campuses. This growth is reflected in the impressive numbers seen in Baltimore, with a notable increase in investment and an influx of talent contributing to the city's vibrant cultural scene. The findings showcase Baltimore's emergence as a key player in the national landscape, solidifying its position as a hub for creativity and innovation.

data.title: Granite (NYSE: GVA) to release Q4 & FY 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026, with an investor call at 8:00 a.m. PT. Visit investor.graniteconstruction.com for webcast.
data.description: Granite (NYSE: GVA) is set to announce its financial results for the quarter and fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, on Thursday, February 12, 2026, before the market opens. An investor conference call is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. PT on the same day. Investors are encouraged to tune in to a live audio webcast of the call on the Investor Relations page of Granite's website at investor.graniteconstruction.com. Additional details about the call will be provided.

data.title: Pinterest plans to reduce 15% of its workforce in AI restructuring to focus on AI roles, addressing concerns about tech's impact.
data.description: The company is shifting its focus towards roles centered on artificial intelligence (AI) as a response to growing worries about the technology's effect on the tech workforce.

data.title: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) declares $0.2075 per share quarterly dividend, payable on Feb 25, 2026. Largest consumer health company.
data.description: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) based in Summit, N.J., has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2075 per share on its common stock. Shareholders of record as of February 11, 2026, will receive this dividend on February 25, 2026. Kenvue Inc. is known as the world's leading consumer health company in terms of revenue and boasts iconic brands like Aveeno® and BAND-AID® Brand. With a rich heritage spanning over a century, Kenvue Inc. continues to be a prominent player in the consumer health industry.

data.title: Wallbox and Eneco eMobility partner to expand EV infrastructure in Benelux. Wallbox to supply eM4 Twin commercial AC chargers for Dutch deployment.
data.description: Wallbox, a global leader in electric vehicle charging technology, has partnered with Eneco eMobility, a top provider of smart charging stations in the Netherlands, Belgium, and Luxembourg. The partnership aims to enhance commercial EV infrastructure expansion. As per the agreement, Wallbox will supply its commercial AC charger, the eM4 Twin, as the primary hardware solution for the initial deployment in the Netherlands. This collaboration signifies a step towards advancing sustainable transportation and promoting widespread adoption of electric vehicles.

data.title: Research report projects Direct Mail Fulfillment market to reach $5.24 billion in 2025, with 8% CAGR. Market opportunities and trends discussed.
data.description: In Dublin, the Direct Mail Fulfillment Service Market Report for 2025 has been released, with projections showing a notable growth from $4.85 billion in 2024 to an estimated $5.24 billion in 2025. This increase represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8%. The surge in the market size can be linked to various factors such as the increasing popularity of physical engagement, the implementation of hybrid marketing approaches, and a rise in demand for these services.

data.title: Nidec shares deemed Security on Special Alert by Tokyo Stock Exchange on Oct 28, 2025, for internal management issues.
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, on October 28, 2025, the Tokyo Stock Exchange labeled the Company's shares as Security on Special Alert due to issues in the internal management system. The designation was made after determining the urgent need for improvement. The Tokyo Stock Exchange, Inc. took this action based on their assessment of the Company's operations. The Company received the Security on Special Alert status on the same date in 2025. The announcement was part of the "Notice Regarding Designation of Security on Special Alert by Tokyo Stock Exchange."
Navient releases Q4 2025 financial results.

data.title: Nidec sets up "Culture Transformation Lab" for fundamental change effective February 01, 2026.
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, Nidec Corporation (TOKYO: 6594; OTC US: NJDCY) has introduced the Culture Transformation Lab (the “Lab”) as part of its commitment to fundamental cultural transformation, starting from February 01, 2026. The Lab was established under the Nidec Corporate Reform Committee, tasked with developing and implementing measures to enhance operations and prevent future issues.

data.title: LoanWorks, Inc. is first mortgage broker to integrate AngelAi into its platform, revolutionizing AI-powered lending.
data.description: LoanWorks, Inc. based in San Diego made a notable announcement on Jan. 28, 2026, revealing their status as the pioneering mortgage broker to implement AngelAi seamlessly into their primary operating system at the fundamental workflow stage. This move is a major achievement in the advancement of AI-driven lending practices.

data.title: RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES) declares $0.04 per share quarterly cash dividend, payable March 10, 2026 to stockholders on record Feb 10, 2026.
data.description: Today, RPC, Inc. (NYSE: RES) based in Atlanta disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of $0.04 per share.
